title: Why was Claude Mythos really delayed? OpenAI points to Anthropic's massive compute constraints, says report
summary: OpenAI has claimed that it has a significant advantage over Anthropic due to its early expansion of computing resources. The company also said in a leaked memo that Claude Mythos was delayed due to computing issues.

title: 'The biggest consumer fraud': Telegram CEO claims WhatsApp is secretly reading your private messages
summary: Telegram's CEO Pavel Durov has criticized WhatsApp's encryption claims, labeling them as ‘biggest consumer fraud in history’. Durov asserted that WhatsApp reads users' messages and shares them, a sentiment echoed by Elon Musk.&nbsp;

title: OpenAI takes on Anthropic, overhauls ChatGPT Pro subscription with new AI plan: here's what you need to know
summary: OpenAI has launched a $100/month ChatGPT subscription, offering increased Codex usage to compete with Anthropic's Claude Code. The new Pro tier provides access to exclusive features and the company is also offering a temporary promotion for existing users.

title: Elon Musk says WhatsApp's end-to-end encryption can't be trusted, Mark Zuckerberg's company calls it ‘absurd’
summary: Elon Musk criticized WhatsApp, saying 'can't trust' it, in light of a class-action lawsuit alleging Meta intercepted private messages despite WhatsApp's end-to-end encryption promises. He also encouraged users to switch to X Chat, which he promotes as an encrypted chat experience.

title: Indias 5G consumers will reach over a billion by 2030: Jyotiraditya M Scindia
summary: Union Minister of Communications, Jyotiraditya M Scindia, stated that India will have more than a billion users of 5G by the year 2030. Speaking at AIMA's 11th National Leadership Conclave, the Minister highlighted that India became the second-largest mobile phone producer globally.

title: Mint Explainer | Can AI find bugs humans can’t? Inside Anthropic’s Project Glasswing
summary: Anthropic’s Project Glasswing aims to use advanced AI to detect hard-to-find software vulnerabilities. Backed by Big Tech, the initiative may reshape how software is secured and could eventually disrupt cybersecurity firms and IT services models.

summary: Elon Musk and Pavel Durov have criticised WhatsApp over privacy concerns. Musk said "can't trust WhatsApp" and instead promoted X Chat, while Durov called it the “biggest consumer fraud in history”. Their remarks follow a US lawsuit questioning WhatsApp’s privacy practices.
